title: base: './' for offline double-click
rationale: Default Vite base '/' emits absolute /assets paths that 404 under file://. Setting base: './' makes dist/index.html self-contained and double-clickable with no server. Build once, open dist/index.html forever; only rebuild on source change. npm run preview is the alternative (server at :4173).

content: Web Workers must be inlined for the offline file:// build. Import worker modules with Vite's '?worker&inline' suffix so they bundle as a Blob URL — Chrome blocks 'new Worker(file://…)' module workers with origin 'null', but Blob-URL workers run fine under double-click. Confirmed: inlined build emits no separate worker chunk and contains Blob/createObjectURL. Relates to base:'./' decision (mx-926bd7).
